narration_target_windows.0-10s: telemetry-anchored visual mining / 5-camera grid + window strip
narration_target_windows.10-22s: operator tunnel hypothesis (field log quote, provisional triage)
narration_target_windows.22-32s: BlackBox refutation — rover numSV never collapses, fixType=3 100%
narration_target_windows.32-52s: real RTK heading root cause — moving-base→rover RTCM uplink silent
narration_target_windows.52-70s: scoped patch / diff proposal · proposed for human review (no auto-apply)

beats.name: visual_mining
beats.content: 5-camera grid (cam1..cam5, w03 slot 4) + 7-window timeline strip (priority ≥ 0.95 in amber, lower in muted amber). Rejects uniform sampling, densifies inside windows.

beats.name: operator_hypothesis
beats.content: Field-log quote 'el GPS falla cuando entramos al túnel.' + provisional triage (bug class #2 sensor timeout, GNSS) + 'what the data must show to confirm' checklist.

beats.name: refutation
beats.content: rtk_numsv plot (median 29, min 16, never approaches 4-SV floor) + verdict pills + 'operator hypothesis — GNSS outage during tunnel REFUTED' strike-through.

beats.name: real_root_cause
beats.content: rtk_carrier_contrast plot (rover CARR_NONE 100% vs MB FLOAT 63.6%/FIXED 30.7%) + rel_pos_valid plot (REL_POS_VALID flat zero, DIFF_SOLN 15%) + numeric stat card sourced from rtk_heading_break_01.json.

beats.name: patch_proposal
beats.content: Three-file scoped diff (moving_base.yaml RTCM3 enable, rover.yaml RTCM3 in_protocol + UART2INPROT-RTCM3X, prelaunch_watchdog.py latched RTK gate) with slow vertical pan over the diff PNG. 'human review required — no auto-apply' caveat box.

source_assets_used: data/runs/sanfer_sanisidro__no_prompt/frames/  (5× cam1..cam5, window w03 slot 04, real bag frames)
data/runs/sanfer_sanisidro__no_prompt/windows.json  (7 candidate windows, priorities — rendered verbatim on timeline strip)
docs/assets/rtk_carrier_contrast.png  (matplotlib output of scripts/render_rtk_plots.py over telemetry.npz)
docs/assets/rtk_numsv.png            (same script, rover numSV vs 4-SV 3D-fix floor)
demo_assets/diff_viewer/moving_base_rover.png  (playwright screenshot of the 3-panel HTML diff produced by scripts/render_rtk_diff.py)
black-box-bench/runs/sample/rtk_heading_break_01.json  (real Claude analyze run — stat-card numbers come from its evidence array)
edits_performed: PIL composite of 5 beats at 30 fps, 2100 frames total
smoothstep crossfades (XFADE=0.5s) between beats, matching block_07/08 cadence
5-cam grid with shadow recipe + black corner cam-id labels in amber
telemetry timeline strip with priority-coloured window markers
operator quote in IBM Plex-style serif weight (DejaVu fallback) on muted-amber accent rail
REFUTED tag reuses block_07 strike-through + tag visual
diff panel slow vertical pan (ease-in-out, 2.0s–14.0s of beat E)
remaining_work: voice-over not recorded (timing windows above were authored to be VO-friendly; bake in an audio pass before final cut)
operator quote text is a faithful Spanish paraphrase of the field-note recorded in memory (project_sanfer_finding.md). Not a verbatim transcript — see notes.md before publishing.
